dashboardSubtitle: Naku ukubuka konke okusheshayo komsizi wakho wezempilo yesikhumba.
advancedAiAnalysisDesc: Thola ukuhlolwa okunemininingwane yobungozi bezilonda zesikhumba sakho nge-AI yethu yesimanje, exhaswe yi-Bio-LLM ekhethekile.
newSkinAnalysisDesc: Layisha isithombe ukuze uthole ukuhlolwa kobungozi okuxhaswe yi-AI.
uvEnvironmentDesc: Hlola isikolo sobungozi besikhumba sangempela esisekelwe endaweni yakho.
geneticRiskAnalyzerDesc: Bika amathuba akho okuthola i-melanoma yofuzo.
dermatologyDigitalTwinDesc: Buka imodeli ebonakalayo yempilo yesikhumba sakho ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.

pageHeader.title: Ukuhlaziya Isilonda Sesikhumba
pageHeader.subtitle: Layisha isithombe ukuze uthole ukuhlolwa kobungozi okuxhaswe yi-AI.

upload.title: Layisha Isithombe Sakho
upload.description: Chofoza ngezansi ukuze ukhethe isithombe sesilonda sesikhumba.
upload.fileTypes: Isekela i-JPEG, PNG, WEBP. Ngezinjongo zokufundisa kuphela.

results.title: Imiphumela Yokuhlaziya
results.disclaimer: Ukuzihlangula: Lokhu ukuhlolwa okwenziwe yi-AI ngezinjongo zokufundisa futhi akukhona ukuxilongwa kwezokwelapha. Hlala uthintana nochwepheshe bezempilo oqeqeshiwe.

questionnaire.title: Imibuzo Yokuxilonga
questionnaire.description: Phendula le mibuzo ukuze usize i-AI icwengisise ukuhlolwa kwayo.

analysis.generateAudioPrompt: Chofoza inkinobho ukuze ukhiqize ukufundwa komsindo kokuhlaziya.

toast.analysisFailedDesc: Ayikwazanga ukukhiqiza incazelo ye-AI. Sicela uzame futhi.
toast.assessmentRefinedDesc: Ukuhlolwa kwakho kobungozi kubuyekeziwe ngokusekelwe ezimpendulo zakho.
toast.refinementFailedDesc: Ayikwazanga ukucwengisisa ukuhlolwa. Sicela uzame futhi.

pageHeader.title: Buza i-Bio-LLM Yethu Yezokwelapha
pageHeader.subtitle: Thola izimpendulo zemibuzo yakho yesikhumba ku-AI yethu ekhethekile.

toast.errorDesc: Kuhlulekile ukuthola impendulo ku-AI. Sicela uzame futhi.

pageHeader.title: Iwele Ledijithali Lesikhumba
pageHeader.subtitle: Imodeli ebonakalayo yesikhumba sakho ebuyekezwa ngakho konke ukuskena.

evolutionCard.title: Ukuziphendukela Kwesilonda & Ukulimala Kwelanga
evolutionCard.description: Ibonisa ukuqoqeka kokulimala kwelanga nokubukeka kwesikhathi esizayo okubikezelwe.

pageHeader.title: Isihlaziyi Sobungozi Bofuzo
pageHeader.subtitle: Bika amathuba akho okuthola i-melanoma yofuzo usebenzisa imodeli yobungozi ye-Bayesian.

formCard.title: Ulwazi Lwakho
formCard.description: Le datha isetshenziselwa ukubala isikolo sakho sobungozi.

skinTypes.III: Uhlobo III (Lunsundu ngokukhanyayo, ngezinye izikhathi luyasha)
skinTypes.V: Uhlobo V (Lunsundu kakhulu, akuvamile neze ukusha)
skinTypes.VI: Uhlobo VI (Lunombala omnyama kakhulu, alushi neze)

resultCard.title: Umphumela Wokuhlaziya
resultCard.disclaimer: Lokhu kuyisibikezelo esisekelwe kumamodeli wezibalo hhayi ukuxilongwa okusemthethweni. Thintana nomhlinzeki wezempilo ukuze uthole ukuhlolwa okuphelele.
resultCard.prefix: Amathuba akho okuthola i-melanoma yofuzo angama:

pageHeader.title: Izincomo Ezenziwe Zaba Ngezakho
pageHeader.subtitle: Gcwalisa ifomu elingezansi ukuze uthole amathiphu enhlanzeko nendlela yokuphila enziwe yi-AI.

detailsCard.title: Imininingwane Yakho
detailsCard.description: Nikeza ulwazi oluthile ukuze uthole ulwazi olwenzelwe wena.

concerns.label: Ukukhathazeka Okuyinhloko
concerns.placeholder: isb., ukulwa nokuguga, imibimbi, amabala amnyama...

planCard.title: Uhlelo Lwakho Olwenziwe Lwaba Ngolwakho
planCard.description: Nanka amathiphu akhiqizwe yi-AI ngokusekelwe kuphrofayili yakho.

toast.failedDesc: Ayikwazanga ukukhiqiza izincomo. Sicela uzame futhi.

pageHeader.title: Isikhungo Se-Tele-Derm
pageHeader.subtitle: Thola futhi uxhumane nodokotela besikhumba abaqinisekisiwe abavela emhlabeni wonke.

pageHeader.title: Uhlelo Lwe-Onco-Connect Triage
pageHeader.subtitle: Ibhuloho lakho phakathi kokuhlaziywa kwe-AI nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kochwepheshe.

referralCard.title: Ikhadi Lokudlulisela Ledijithali
referralCard.description: Khombisa lokhu kuchwepheshe wezempilo ukuze uthole isifinyezo esisheshayo sokuhlaziya kwakho.

map.title: Izikhungo Ze-Oncology Eziqinisekisiwe Eziseduze
map.description: Faka indawo yakho ukuze uthole izikhungo eziqinisekisiwe eduze nawe.
map.searchPlaceholder: isb., idolobha lakho noma ikhodi yeposi

pageHeader.title: Ingozi ye-UV & Imvelo
pageHeader.subtitle: Thola isikolo sobungozi besikhumba sangempela sendawo yakho.

recommendations.lagos: Chitha imizuzu engaphansi kweyi-8 elangeni eliqondile. Gcoba i-SPF 30+ njalo ngamahora ama-2.
recommendations.kabul: Chitha imizuzu eyi-10-15 elangeni eliqondile. Gcoba i-SPF 30+.
recommendations.nairobi: Nciphisa ukuphuma elangeni phakathi kuka-10 ekuseni no-4 ntambama. Gqoka izingubo ezivikelayo.
